layout.spacing: Generous scaling: p-4 for internal widgets, p-8 to p-12 for section blocks. Use bento grid patterns.
layout.border_radius: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) for structural sharpness.
layout.shadows: Ambient subtle shadows only. shadow-md on popovers, none on cards (rely on borders).

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-zinc-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
surfaces.modals: Solid flat bg-zinc-950 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50

interactions.hover: Subtle background lightening (hover:bg-zinc-800) and text brightening (hover:text-white). For buttons, -translate-y-[1px].
interactions.motion: Framer Motion for layout transitions, staggerChildren for lists.

component_strategy.buttons: Flat, text-sm, font-medium. Primary has bg-indigo-500 text-white hover:bg-indigo-400. Secondary uses bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-700.
component_strategy.tables: Dense rows, border-b border-white/5, text-sm. No side borders.
component_strategy.charts: Recharts. Use monochromatic tones + primary accent for data lines.

hero_background.usage: Use in the marketing landing page hero section, overlaid with bg-black/60 for text contrast.

ai_avatar.usage: Use as the avatar/icon for the AI Assistant chat interface and roadmap generation features.

course_placeholder_tech.usage: Default thumbnail for Technical / Developer courses.

course_placeholder_business.usage: Default thumbnail for Business / Analytics courses.

logos.usage: Company logo for Job listings or Partner sections (Audible).
Company logo for Job listings or Partner sections (OpenAI).
Company logo for Job listings or Partner sections (Pexels).

specific_page_rules.marketing_landing: Highly animated. Use Framer Motion. Hero text must be massive and left-aligned or perfectly centered with high tension. Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for pricing tables.
specific_page_rules.student_dashboard: Strict bento grid layout (Control Room style). Focus heavily on current progress. Dense metrics, lots of whitespace around the actual dashboard shell.
specific_page_rules.course_player: Dark theme everywhere. Sidebar for curriculum (bg-zinc-950), main area for video player (bg-black).
specific_page_rules.ai_assistant: Should feel like a premium command center. Soft glowing indigo elements around the chat. Multi-purpose tab switcher (doubt solver, resume reviewer, roadmap) must be snappy.

critical_directives: ALL interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) except for video player backgrounds; use #09090B.
Avoid standard Bootstrap/equal-width columns. Use asymmetric 12-column bento layouts.
Forms must use Shadcn customized to have flat aesthetics.
Hover states must be explicit, e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white.
All containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
